subcodes.first_line: O Persian servant of God! Praise be unto the Lord that the Persians are pilgrims at the Threshold and the Zoroastrians draw nigh unto the Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده پارسی الهی الحمد لله که پارسیان زائر آستانند و زردشتیان مقرب درگاه
subcodes.subjects: @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise of Eastern values; culture
